eras.name: Flourishing Villages
eras.subtitle: The world is full and the sea provides.
eras.description: The Pacific coast thrives. Villages dot the shoreline, canoes move freely between islands, and the salmon runs are strong. Your community is young but full of promise.
eras.transition_narrative: Your name is spoken beyond the inlet now. The first pole stands before your longhouse, and your potlatch table has been full. But the coast is wider than you knew, and other houses watch your rise with interest — and envy.

eras.name: Expanding Influence
eras.subtitle: Our name is known beyond the inlet.
eras.description: Your community's reputation reaches across the strait. Longer voyages, bigger trades, deeper rivalries. The time of small things is ending.
eras.transition_narrative: The greatest houses on the coast know your name. Your poles stand tall, your canoes are feared and admired, and your potlatch table groans with wealth that will become legend. This is the time to build something that will outlast you.

eras.name: Great Legacy
eras.subtitle: We are among the greatest houses on the coast.
eras.description: Peak power. The grandest potlatches, the most impressive poles, the most powerful canoes. This is the era of defining choices — what kind of legacy will you build?
eras.transition_narrative:
You have built something magnificent. The poles cast long shadows. The canoes are known by name. The potlatch feasts are spoken of across the coast.

But the world is changing. Distant smoke on the horizon. Strange vessels. Whispers from the south of a sickness no healer can name.

The tide is turning. And you must carry your people through what comes next.

eras.name: Disruption and Survival
eras.subtitle: The world we knew is changing. We must endure.
eras.description: Epidemic. Demographic loss. New powers on the coast. Economic disruption. The world that shaped your people for generations is being reshaped by forces beyond any chief's control.
eras.transition_narrative:
The worst has passed — or perhaps it has merely changed form. Your village is smaller. Some longhouses stand empty. But the poles endure. The canoes still ride the waves. And the fire in the chief's house still burns.

What will be remembered?

eras.name: Enduring Memory
eras.subtitle: What remains when the tide recedes?
eras.description: The final chapter. Shorter than the others — more epilogue than era. The game asks: what did you build? What survives? What is remembered?

dimensions.name: Spiritual Harmony
dimensions.description: Omens heeded, blessings sought, ceremonies honored

dimensions.name: Resilience
dimensions.description: How the community navigated disruption and loss

rating_thresholds.900: Eternal — The Tideline That Never Fades
rating_thresholds.150: Fading — Spoken of Less Each Year
rating_thresholds.0: Forgotten — The Tide Has Washed the Shore Clean
